About

Strategy meets shipping.

I started as an Instrumentation & Control engineer at NSUT, but found my real craft sitting between engineering and the messy human problems that products are supposed to solve.

At Physics Wallah, I shipped CLM journeys, OTP-less auth, and CRM automations that moved the needle on adoption, conversion, and operational cost. Star Performer twice.

At Bain & Co., I now lead Voice-of-Customer studies and digital benchmarking. But the work I'm proudest of is the customer sentiment product I built in Python that's reused across case teams.

I'm looking for my next product role: something with real users, real impact, and the room to keep building things that didn't exist yesterday.

Experience

Where I've shipped.

A timeline of the products, analyses, and tools I've built, with the numbers behind them.

Bain & Company
Senior Analyst · Gurugram, India
Aug 2025 – Present
  • Built and launched an internal customer sentiment analysis product in Python (Pandas, OpenAI API), now reused across case teams, surfacing CX insights at 10x the speed of manual analysis.
  • Led 20+ Outside-In digital benchmarking engagements using SimilarWeb and competitor teardowns, driving targeted interventions that lifted digital traffic and conversion by 10%.
  • Delivered 50+ Voice-of-Customer studies using Van Westendorp, Gabor-Granger, and MaxDiff methodologies, shaping client GTM decisions.
Physics Wallah | CuriousJr.
Associate Product Manager · Gurugram, India
Oct 2024 – July 2025
  • Owned end-to-end design and launch of CLM journeys on MoEngage by integrating CRM with backend APIs and business-triggered events, driving a 16% lift in app adoption and 5.2% uplift in funnel conversion.
  • Spearheaded OTP-less authentication via Smart Network Authentication (SNA), designing a zero-tap fallback flow (Truecaller → WhatsApp → SMS) that boosted the auth funnel by 13.5%.
  • Automated post-purchase time-slot allocation inside the internal CRM, cutting manual handling by 74% (2 hrs → 30 mins) and lifting master-course conversions by 18%.
Siemens AG
Project Management Intern · Gurugram, India
Dec 2023 – Jan 2024
  • Analyzed data across 7 active projects, recommending product enhancements that drove a 15% increase in operational efficiency.
  • Evaluated 100+ field readings from Track Vacancy Detection (TCM-100) systems at DMRC, improving system reliability.
